message: Use clause code to build a simple tinder clone that is native on web and send me

plan.task: Design user interface and user experience for the Tinder clone, including profile creation, swipe functionality, and match display
Develop backend API using Node.js and Express to handle user data, profile storage, and match algorithm implementation
Implement real-time database using MongoDB to store user information, preferences, and match history, ensuring data consistency and scalability
Create frontend application using React and Redux, integrating API and database to provide seamless user interaction, swipe functionality, and match notifications
